title: nephrodium unitum
intro: Nephrodium unitum, also known as Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and to help reduce inflammation due to its high concentration of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Nephrodium unitum include its potential to aid in the treatment of urinary tract issues, as well as its possible use in reducing fever and alleviating pain. The plant is often prepared as an herbal infusion or decoction, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to create a medicinal tincture or salve.
